name: Trendline Adult Cat Food - Lamb & Rice 10KG
description: Trendline Adult Cat Food - Lamb & Rice , fully balanced all-natural cat food with chicken protein, brewer's yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...............................27% Fat ....................................10% Crude Ash ........................ 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)....... 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Why Your Cat Will Love It 27% High-Quality Protein – supports muscle strength and overall vitality. 10% Healthy Fats – for a silky coat and optimal energy levels. Brewer’s Yeast – enhances immunity and supports digestive health. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – reduce shedding and promote skin health. Taurine Enriched – essential for healthy eyes and heart function. Why Cat Parents Love It: . Helps maintain healthy weight and strong muscles . Promotes a shiny coat and healthy skin . Supports heart health and immunity
